prompt: Write a short Game of Thrones fanfic scene in which Gendry, somehow having travelled back in time, tries to prevent the Red Wedding.
Write a short Lord of the Rings fanfic scene of the morning Frodo wakes up alone in Bag End for the first time since returning to the Shire.
Write a short Attack on Titan fanfic scene in which Eren and Mikasa meet for the last time.
Write a short Walking Dead fanfic scene of one quiet night Carl and Rick share at the prison.
Write a short Hunger Games fanfic scene of the first morning Katniss wakes up at home after Prim's death.
Write a short Breaking Bad fanfic scene of one evening Walter White spends at home after his diagnosis, before he has told anyone.
Write a short Harry Potter fanfic scene of one evening Severus Snape spends alone on the anniversary of Lily Evans's death.
Write a short Star Wars fanfic scene of one quiet hour Anakin Skywalker spends alone the night before he falls to the dark side.
Write a short Harry Potter fanfic scene of the trio realising they are lost in the Forbidden Forest after dark.
Write a short Star Wars fanfic scene of a bounty hunter accepting a job in a Mos Eisley cantina.
Write a short BBC Sherlock fanfic scene of Sherlock and John arriving at the site of an unusual case.
Write a short Doctor Who fanfic scene of the Doctor and a companion stepping out of the TARDIS onto an unfamiliar planet.
Write a short Stranger Things fanfic scene of Dustin venturing alone to the edge of the Upside Down.
Write a short Spider-Man fanfic scene of Peter Parker on a slow patrol night in Queens.
Write a short Avatar: The Last Airbender fanfic scene of Toph stopping at a roadside inn while travelling alone through the Earth Kingdom.
Write a short Bridgerton fanfic scene of a quiet morning at Aubrey Hall.
Write a short Kiki's Delivery Service fanfic scene of Kiki making a delivery in an unfamiliar town.
Write a short Pride and Prejudice fanfic scene of Elizabeth and Darcy walking the grounds at Pemberley.
Write a short My Neighbor Totoro fanfic scene of an afternoon Mei and Satsuki spend in the woods.
Write a short Schitt's Creek fanfic scene of a slow afternoon David and Patrick spend at the store.
